endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.WindowsIoT/operations
endpoints.description: Lists all of the available Windows IoT Services REST API operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.WindowsIoT/deviceServices
endpoints.description: Get all the IoT hubs in a subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.WindowsIoT/deviceServices
endpoints.description: Get all the IoT hubs in a resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.WindowsIoT/deviceServices/{deviceName}
endpoints.description: Get the non-security related metadata of a Windows IoT Device Service.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{DEVICENAME}} with a real devicename.

endpoints.name: Create or update the metadata of a Windows IoT Device Service.
endpoints.description: Create or update the metadata of a Windows IoT Device Service. The usual pattern to modify a property is to retrieve the Windows IoT Device Service metadata and security metadata, and then combine them with the modified values in a new body to update the Windows IoT Device Service.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{DEVICENAME}} with a real devicename.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.WindowsIoT/deviceServices/{deviceName}
endpoints.description: Delete a Windows IoT Device Service.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{DEVICENAME}} with a real devicename.

endpoints.name: Updates the metadata of a Windows IoT Device Service.
endpoints.description: Updates the metadata of a Windows IoT Device Service. The usual pattern to modify a property is to retrieve the Windows IoT Device Service metadata and security metadata, and then combine them with the modified values in a new body to update the Windows IoT Device Service.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{DEVICENAME}} with a real devicename.
